response.justification: The candidate demonstrates well over the required 6 years of fullstack experience with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, AWS), including recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work that directly matches the AI agent development requirement. A strong testing and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, test-framework authorship) aligns with the role's quality expectations. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, and Vitest is not named, though the depth of testing expertise suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and cloud/container tooling
Recent AI-agent and MCP code-generation work matching the AI agent development requirement
Deep testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a primary stack component
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated and secondary
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named despite broad testing background
